title: work-dev plugin project config
description: Project-level config for claude-plugin-work-dev (.work-dev/config.jsonc). All fields optional; leave empty to use auto-inference from docs/ and tasks/ directories. Two-layer override: plugin defaults + this file.

$schema.description: Optional self-reference to this schema for IDE autocomplete

docs_root.description: Documentation root directory. Auto-inferred from existence of docs/ documentation/ doc/

tasks_root.description: Task document directory. Auto-inferred from existence of tasks/ task/ worklog/

code_roots.description: Code root directories. For monorepo use ["packages/"]. Auto-inferred from package.json workspaces / pyproject.toml packages / Cargo.toml workspace

modules.description: Module whitelist by category. Empty array = auto-infer from docs/<category>/*.md file names (without .md suffix)

feature.description: Business / functional modules. Auto-inferred from docs/features/*.md

stack.description: Technical layer / package modules. Auto-inferred from docs/stack/*.md

data.description: Data schema / API modules. Common values: database, api

strict_modules.description: true = reject unknown modules with error; false = ask user + create placeholder doc at docs/<category>/<name>.md

extra_categories.description: Custom doc categories beyond the canonical 5 (feature/stack/data/ops/decisions)

trigger.description: Description of what code change triggers doc sync to this category

high_risk_ops_extra.description: Project-specific high-risk operations appended to canonical 5 (delete/migration/deployment/auth/payment). Phase 2 impact analysis flags these explicitly.

project_name.description: Project name for workflow markers and task doc frontmatter. Auto-inferred from git remote name or directory name.

default_complexity.description: Default complexity when user does not explicitly specify light|standard|deep

test_commands.description: Test commands keyed by free-form names. Phase 6 matches changed file's longest path prefix against code_roots[i]/<key>/ to select which key to run. Auto-inferred from package.json scripts / pyproject.toml if absent.

agent_counts.description: Override default agent counts (light=1, standard=2, deep=3). Specifying a tier replaces that tier entirely; unspecified tiers keep defaults.

drift_scan_extra_targets.description: Additional drift-scan targets beyond docs_root + README.md. Examples: wiki/, ARCHITECTURE.md, CHANGELOG.md

auto_commit.description: true = Phase 7 commits automatically; false = Phase 7 stages but waits for user approval

template_path.description: Task document template path. Default: <tasks_root>/_template.md. Falls back to plugin's templates/_template.md if not found.

lessons_path.description: Lessons database path. Default: <tasks_root>/_lessons.md. Falls back to plugin's templates/_lessons.md if not found.
